synopsis: Released in 1985, Guinea Pig: Devil's Experiment is a horror film from Japan. It has a 3.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1980s and genre rankings. It carries a NC-17 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
